message:
fix(core): pass runtime cursors to fleet_pane_infos_from_registry

The function previously read pane activity counters from PaneRegistry's
internal cursor map, which is initialized at discovery time but never
updated by the capture pipeline. The runtime maintains a separate
authoritative cursor store that tracks real output progress.

Accept a &HashMap<u64, PaneCursor> parameter so the fleet coordinator
sees actual sequence numbers from the capture pipeline rather than
stale initial zeros. Update the maintenance loop callsite to pass the
runtime's cursor map under its read lock. Update all 5 test callsites
to construct external cursor maps.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
